dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent demonstrated full compliance with the governance framework, as evidenced by the successful schema validation and the precise loading of the versioned prompt from the designated path.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The reasoning depth is exceptional, with a completion token count of 65,295 and a processing duration of 262.65 seconds, significantly exceeding the baseline metrics for thoroughness.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The successful execution of the architecture-work-assessment flow, combined with the high volume of reasoning output, indicates a comprehensive analysis and resolution of architectural trade-offs.
